title: What is AI?
description: Let's explore how computers become smarter! 🤖

scenes.speech: AI is amazing, isn't it? Let's go on an adventure together! 🎉
scenes.title: Welcome to the World of AI!

scenes.speech: AI stands for Artificial Intelligence! It's a technology that enables computers to think like humans! 🤓
scenes.title: AI = Artificial Intelligence
scenes.content: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a technology that allows computers to learn, think, and make decisions on their own! 💻
scenes.highlight: AI = Computer that can learn by itself ①

scenes.speech: AI learns from a vast amount of data and creates its own rules! 📊
scenes.title: AI Learns!
scenes.content: Just like humans learn from examples, AI learns from large amounts of data. The more data it has, the smarter it becomes! 🚀

scenes.speech: The brain of AI is called a Neural Network! 🧠
scenes.title: Neural Network = Digital Brain
scenes.content: It's a system modeled after the human brain's neural cells. Millions of digital connections work together to learn! 💡

scenes.speech: ChatGPT and Claude became smart by reading a huge amount of text! 📚
scenes.title: Do you know about AI Chat?
scenes.content: Using a technology called Large Language Model (LLM), AI can generate human-like text! ChatGPT learned from trillions of characters. 📊
scenes.highlight: 📚 Large Text → LLM → Conversational AI ③

scenes.speech: AI can recognize what's in a picture! 📸
scenes.title: AI Image Recognition
scenes.content: It can distinguish between cat and dog photos, recognize faces, and more! AI is even used in smartphone cameras. 📱
scenes.highlight: 📸 Photo → AI Analysis → 'It's a cat!' ④

scenes.speech: AI can help create programs, draw pictures, and more! 🎨
scenes.title: What Can Generative AI Do?
scenes.content: AI can generate text, images, music, videos, and more! It's a helpful tool for various tasks. 🤩
scenes.highlight: Text / Image / Music / Code Generation ⑤

scenes.speech: AI is already being used in many aspects of our daily lives! 🌎
scenes.title: AI in Our Daily Lives
scenes.content: YouTube recommendations, Instagram filters, Google Maps navigation - it's all AI! You've been using it every day. 📺

scenes.speech: In the future, AI will assist doctors, scientists, and teachers! 🌟
scenes.title: The Future of AI
scenes.content: AI will help with early cancer detection, new drug development, and climate change mitigation. You might become an AI creator too! 🎓

scenes.speech: Now you know a bit about AI! Give it a try and have fun! 🎉
scenes.title: Lesson Complete! 🎉
